chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1385 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 01.10.2025 Mr. Ratan Kumar, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Zulfiar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General ************** Compliance report has been submitted by respondent No.3, same is taken on record. From perusal of the compliance report, it appears that the entire payment has been made to the petitioner and nothing remains outstanding. Learned counsel for the petitioner, being satisfied with such statement and under instructions, does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
